title: Kyoto Impressions
content: Most pictures are shot in Kyoto (a few in China and Osaka). Sadly we narrowly missed the sakura season. Shot with Leica CL (with TL 18-56) and Ricoh GR3x HDF.
summary: Most pictures are shot in Kyoto (a few in China and Osaka). Sadly we narrowly missed the sakura season. Shot with Leica CL (with TL 18-56) and Ricoh GR3x HDF.
